infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 AUSTRIAN GRAND PRIX 26 - 28 Jun 2026 The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 17:30, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Oracle Red Bull Racing Document 29 Date 27 June 2026 Time 17:01 No / Driver 6 - Isack H

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 AUSTRIAN GRAND PRIX
26 - 28 Jun 2026
The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 17:30, in relation to the
incident below: 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Oracle Red Bull Racing
Document 29
Date 27 June 2026
Time 17:01
No / Driver 6 - Isack Hadjar
Reason Alleged breach of Article B1.8.5 of the FIA F1 Regulations and non-compliance with
Race Director’s Competition Notes (item 1, document 6) – Car 6 driving
unnecessarily slowly at 16:14.
Felix Holter Loïc Bacquelaine
Pedro Lamy Wilhelm Singer
